description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a natural light wood finish. The front features two main sections: the left side has open shelving with three visible compartments, while the right side has a combination of a closed compartment with a solid door and a single drawer at the bottom. The cabinet stands on short, dark-colored metal legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The back and sides are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with open shelves on one side and a closed door with a drawer on the other, standing on short metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves on the left, a closed door and drawer on the right, and metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wooden back panel and the metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel.
